name: How do I know if AI SEO is actually working?
description: Measure more than traffic: look at AI citations, brand mentions, referral visits, and conversions. Also check whether the right pages are being surfaced for the

mainEntity.name: How do I know if AI SEO is actually working?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should expect AI SEO work to be measured with a mix of traditional SEO metrics and AI-specific signals like citations, mentions, referrals, and conversions. Good programs also track whether the right pages are being surfaced for the right queries.
acceptedAnswer.description: Measure more than traffic: look at AI citations, brand mentions, referral visits, and conversions. Also check whether the right pages are being surfaced for the right questions.
